commit.message:
Add friend challenge system

Backend:
- challenges table (challenge_id, challenger_username, scene_id, score_to_beat)
- POST /api/challenge — creates a challenge link, returns short hex ID + URL
- GET /api/challenge/{id} — returns challenge details (public, no auth)
- GET /challenge/{id} — SPA route: serves index.html so JS handles routing

Frontend:
- URL routing in boot: detects /challenge/[id] path, loads challenge screen
- #challengeScreen — full-page challenge card showing challenger, score, movie
- "Accept Challenge" button opens scene modal with challengeCtx set
- After scoring: showChallengeResult() shows YOU WON / So close overlay
- "⚔ Challenge a Friend" button in score panel → POST to create challenge
- Share panel: copy link + WhatsApp share button
- Login/register from challenge page flows back into challenge after auth

Disable body size limit for recording upload route

Axum's default 2MB limit was dropping large video uploads mid-stream, causing Caddy to return 502. The upload route is now in a sub-router with DefaultBodyLimit::disable().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Bypass http.Transport: use raw tsnet conn with manual HTTP request/response

http.Transport + gvisor userspace TCP has a fundamental incompatibility
with chunked HTTP responses — body reads stall regardless of deadline
settings, DisableKeepAlives, or Connection headers. The 35KB
system.settings response never completes through any http.Transport
configuration.

New approach: dial tsnet directly, write HTTP request via req.Write(conn),
read response via http.ReadResponse with a bufio.Reader, then read body
with per-read deadline refresh (readWithDeadlineRefresh). This gives full
control over the connection lifecycle without Go's HTTP stack interfering
with gvisor's TCP state machine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add purchase module schema + import scripts — migrate 5 years of Airtable data

New `purchase` schema (7 tables): supplier_master, raw_material_master,
purchase_order, purchase_order_item, mrn, mrn_item, rm_stock_movement.
New `production.bom` table for Bill of Materials.

4 business logic triggers: MRN→PO status auto-update, MRN→stock movement,
stock movement→RM balance, updated_at timestamps.

Data imported to Supabase: 183 suppliers, 1481 raw materials, 2266 BOM entries,
3000 POs + 10055 items, 3234 MRNs + 7649 items (FY2020-2026).

commit.message:
Fix overnight analysis OOM: downsample 96kHz, bound memory per chunk

ferrous-waves has super-linear memory scaling with sample rate — 96 kHz
FLAC files caused 25+ GB allocations on a single track. Downsampling to
48 kHz in decode.rs reduces this to ~461 MB while preserving all audible
information.

Additional memory fixes:
- malloc_trim(0) after each chunk returns freed audio buffers to OS
- Chunk size reduced from jobs*2 to jobs (fewer concurrent results)
- Explicit drop() for audio and AnalysisResult before returning
- Per-chunk progress logging via log::info

Also updates overnight_analyze_11pm.sh with memory monitor and adds
run_analysis.sh for simple nohup usage.

Claude/ecommerce implementation frs5m (#27)

* feat: add client auth, reviews system, and search autocomplete

- Client authentication: register, login, logout, profile editing,
  session management with token-based auth (Zustand persistent store)
- Account pages: /cuenta (login/register + dashboard), /cuenta/pedidos
  (order history with expandable details)
- Reviews & ratings: ReviewSection component with star ratings,
  rating distribution bars, filtering, sorting, helpful votes,
  and review submission form. API endpoint for CRUD reviews.
- Search autocomplete: SearchAutocomplete component with debounced
  search, product/category suggestions, recent searches history,
  popular searches, and keyboard-friendly UX
- Updated Navbar: integrated auth state (user menu dropdown with
  initials avatar), search autocomplete, mobile-responsive auth UI

https://claude.ai/code/session_0169NRMfvNZ3t3zs1yYhZKQc

* feat: add payment system, coupons, shipping quotes, and missing pages

- Payment system: 3-step checkout (info → shipping → payment) with
  real order creation API, CARD/SPEI/OXXO methods, payment info
  display (SPEI CLABE details, OXXO reference with copy buttons),
  guest and authenticated checkout flows
- Coupon system: /api/coupons/validate endpoint validates codes
  against promotions DB (percentage, fixed, free shipping), checks
  expiration, usage limits, min purchase. Integrated into checkout
  sidebar with apply/remove UI
- Shipping system: /api/shipping/quote with zone-based rates for
  Estafeta (terrestre + express) and DHL Express (express + 9AM),
  delivery day estimates by zone, free shipping for orders > $5,000
- Order API: /api/orders creates order with items, address, payment
  record, coupon application, and cart clearing
- FAQ page: accordion-style with 5 categories (pedidos, pagos,
  envíos, garantías, devoluciones)
- Terms page: 10 sections covering legal terms for MX ecommerce
- Privacy page: LFPDPPP-compliant privacy policy with ARCO rights
- Footer: updated links to real pages (FAQ, terms, privacy)

https://claude.ai/code/session_0169NRMfvNZ3t3zs1yYhZKQc

* fix: remove deprecated prisma config from package.json

The prisma.seed property in package.json is deprecated in Prisma 7.
Removed it since prisma.config.ts already handles seed configuration.

https://claude.ai/code/session_0169NRMfvNZ3t3zs1yYhZKQc

* feat: redesign UI, add logo, address management, auth guard, and security improvements

- Add SYSCCOM logo SVG to public/ and update Navbar, Footer, Admin layout
- Redesign UI with cleaner slate-based color palette and Inter font
- Add address management system (API + page at /cuenta/direcciones)
- Block checkout for non-authenticated users (auth guard)
- Integrate saved addresses into checkout flow
- Upgrade password hashing from SHA-256 to PBKDF2 with salt (backward compatible)
- Add security headers (X-Frame-Options, CSP, Referrer-Policy, etc.)
- Add token format validation and constant-time comparison
- Stronger password requirements (8+ chars, uppercase, number)
- Add email utility with welcome email on registration
- Improve input sanitization across registration and address APIs

commit.message:
feat(dashboard): one-click update button — git pull + rebuild + restart

- POST /admin/pull-update: runs git pull, detects if .cs files changed,
  if yes: dotnet publish + systemctl restart archimedes (background task
  so response returns before service dies), if no: HTML-only update
  (no restart needed — dashboard.html is read fresh per request)

  Shows busy/ok/err states, polls /health after restart, auto-reloads page
